# Java Volcano Tour Operator (JVTO)
# llms.txt — AI Crawler Discovery File
# https://javavolcano-touroperator.com/llms.txt

## About This Site

Java Volcano Tour Operator (JVTO) is a licensed private tour operator based in Bondowoso, East Java, Indonesia. The company is registered as PT Java Volcano Rendezvous (NIB & TDUP No. 1102230032918) and is led by Bripka Agung Sambuko, an active East Java Tourist Police officer (Ditpamobvit).

JVTO specialises in private volcano and nature tours to Mount Bromo, Ijen Crater (blue fire), Tumpak Sewu Waterfall, Madakaripura Waterfall, and Papuma Beach — departing from Surabaya or Bali.

## Core Thesis

"In a landscape where volcanic nature is uncertain, JVTO sells operational certainty — built on disciplined safety, documented proof, and local execution."

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- **Legal Name**: PT Java Volcano Rendezvous
- **NIB / TDUP**: No. 1102230032918 (issued 2023-02-11, verifiable at oss.go.id)
- **Founder**: Bripka Agung Sambuko (active Tourist Police officer, Ditpamobvit East Java)
- **HPWKI**: Ijen Special Tourism Actors Association, AHU-0001072.AH.01.07.TAHUN 2024
- **ISIC Partner**: Official discount partner, verifiable at isic.org/discounts/?providerId=259268
- **INDECON**: Spotlight member, verifiable at indecon.id/spotlight-networks/java-volcano-tour-operator
- **Trustpilot**: 4.7★ from 44+ verified reviews
- **TripAdvisor**: 5.0★ from verified travellers
- **WhatsApp**: +62 822-4478-8833
- **Website**: https://javavolcano-touroperator.com

## Tour Products

All tours are 100% private (no shared groups). 16 packages available from Surabaya and Bali:

- 1D1N Bromo Midnight Tour (from IDR 1,000,000/person)
- 2D1N Bromo & Madakaripura (from IDR 1,750,000/person)
- 2D1N Ijen Blue Fire (from IDR 1,550,000/person)
- 3D2N Bromo–Madakaripura–Ijen (from IDR 2,450,000/person)
- 3D2N Ijen–Bromo–Madakaripura (from IDR 2,450,000/person)
- 4D3N Ijen–Papuma–Tumpak Sewu–Bromo (from IDR 3,125,000/person)
- 5D4N Ijen–Papuma–Tumpak Sewu–Bromo (from IDR 3,650,000/person)
- 6D5N Full East Java Expedition (from IDR 4,750,000/person)
- Plus 8 more packages from Bali

## Safety Differentiators

1. **Tourist Police-Led**: Founder is an active Tourist Police officer — not a retired officer, not a certificate holder.
2. **Ijen Health Screening**: Mandatory digital health screening (SpO2 + blood pressure) by licensed medical staff (dr. Ahmad Irwandanu, SIP: 503.446/193/DRU/4/430.9.13/2020) before every Ijen night hike.
3. **MAGMA Monitoring**: Real-time volcanic activity monitoring via MAGMA Indonesia (magma.esdm.go.id).
4. **Proof-First Trust**: All credentials are publicly verifiable — NIB at oss.go.id, HPWKI at ahu.go.id, medical SIP at satusehat.kemkes.go.id.

## Cancellation Policy

- Cancellation >48 hours before Day 1: 100% JVTO Travel Credit (lifetime, transferable, no expiry)
- Cancellation <48 hours or no-show: 100% forfeit
- No cash refunds issued

## Destinations

- **Mount Bromo** (2,329m, Tengger Caldera, Bromo Tengger Semeru National Park)
- **Ijen Crater** (2,769m, world's largest acidic crater lake, blue fire phenomenon)
- **Madakaripura Waterfall** (200m, sacred Gajah Mada meditation site, Majapahit heritage)
- **Tumpak Sewu Waterfall** (120m, 'Niagara of Java', Lumajang)
- **Papuma Beach** (Tanjung Papuma, Jember, Indian Ocean)

## Press Coverage

- Stefan Loose Reiseführer Indonesien (2016) — Page 287 listing
- Detik.com (2021-03-14) — Tourist Police feature
- Radar Jember / Jawa Pos (2021-03-24) — Ijen Geopark Tourist Police formation
- BBKSDA East Java (2024-05-24) — Guide training programme

- NIB: https://oss.go.id
- HPWKI: https://ahu.go.id/sabh/perkumpulan/qrcode/?kode=NjAyNDAxMjczNTEwMTM2MV8wXzA3IEZlYnJ1YXJpIDIwMjRfMjcgSmFudWFyeSAyMDI0
- ISIC: https://isic.org/discounts/?providerId=259268
- INDECON: https://indecon.id/spotlight-networks/java-volcano-tour-operator
